text: - 2) Subcontractor  shall  submit  Shop  Drawings  detailing  the  size  and  type  of  counters  to  be installed in each unit type shown in the subcontract documents.  Contractor reserves the right to modify any portion of these shop drawings and final approval must be received from the Contractor in writing prior to the commencement of any work.  Product has 60 days to arrive on site for installation and if material does not arrive then subcontractor will manufacture from local materials.
